narrative.headline: Brake and electronics complaints lead the 2018 Altima
narrative.summary: From 222 owner reports to NHTSA, service brakes are the most common complaint at 22%, followed by the electrical system (17%) and air bags (16%). Power train issues (10%) and forward collision avoidance (7%) round out the top five. No fires, injuries, or deaths were reported, though a handful of complaints involved crashes, so the details below are worth a read.

issues.title: Service Brakes
issues.blurb: The top complaint: 49 reports (22% of all complaints). Includes 4 crashes; no fires or injuries reported.

issues.blurb: 15 reports (7%), often about the automatic emergency braking system not working. No crashes, fires, or injuries reported.
